introSection: Wild Mouse was a roller coaster built by American firm B. A. Schiff & Associates previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was operated as a concession by B. A. Schiff & Associates.

The ride was removed after the 1960 season.

fullText:
Wild Mouse was a roller coaster built by American firm B. A. Schiff & Associates previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA.

The ride was operated as a concession by B. A. Schiff & Associates.

The ride was removed after the 1960 season.
